serviceNotes.engine oil: CBS oil service MFR 30,000 km / 24 months EU maximum with Long-Life oil (SIB B000214 / service display).
serviceNotes.micro filter: Interior filter at every engine oil change per garage.wiki F32 LCI 2020 (G14 840i B58 CBS).
serviceNotes.brake fluid: Every 2 years after first change; garage.wiki F32 LCI lists first change at 3 years.
serviceNotes.air cleaner element: Air filter each second engine oil service (60,000 km) per garage.wiki F32 LCI 2020.
serviceNotes.spark plugs: Changed from 90,000 km to 60,000 km: six spark plugs with each second engine oil change (garage.wiki F32 LCI 2020).
serviceNotes.intake carbon clean: Direct injection: carbon service ~120,000 km if needed.

serviceSources.engine oil: BMW SIB B000214 Attachment 2 (CBS intervals) — 30,000 km / 24 months EU maximum. https://garage.wiki/bmw/4-series-coupe/first-generation-lci-f32/2020/service-intervals.html (G14 840i B58)
serviceSources.micro filter: https://garage.wiki/bmw/4-series-coupe/first-generation-lci-f32/2020/service-intervals.html — interior filter at every engine oil change
serviceSources.brake fluid: https://garage.wiki/bmw/4-series-coupe/first-generation-lci-f32/2020/service-intervals.html — first change 3 years then every 2 years; BMW owner's manual G14 840i
serviceSources.air cleaner element: https://garage.wiki/bmw/4-series-coupe/first-generation-lci-f32/2020/service-intervals.html — air filter with each second engine oil change (60,000 km)
serviceSources.spark plugs: Changed from 90,000 km to 60,000 km per https://garage.wiki/bmw/4-series-coupe/first-generation-lci-f32/2020/service-intervals.html — second engine oil change
serviceSources.check front brake pads: BMW SIB B000214 Attachment 2 (CBS brake service); 50,000 km planning interval
serviceSources.check rear brake pads: BMW SIB B000214 Attachment 2 (CBS brake service); 60,000 km planning interval
serviceSources.vehicle check: BMW SIB B000214 Attachment 2 — vehicle check every second engine oil service (60,000 km)
